'''Hoth's Brand''' was the primary of the two stars of the [[Ruusan system/Legends|Hoth's Brand system]] that was located in the [[Teraab sector/Legends|Teraab sector]].

The [[Star/Legends|star]] was named after [[Jedi Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]].

{{Star-stub}}
